name: WaterChemistryValidation
label: Water chemistry validation
description: Merges per-subprogram water chemistry CSV files by SiteCode, fills replicate samples, and computes a full set of chemical quality indicators following ICP-Forest protocols: ionic balance (with and without organic anion correction), Na/Cl ratio, theoretical vs measured conductivity, ionic strength, ionic activity factor, NDON and OrgN consistency checks. Produces a FINAL_VALIDATION flag per sample. Quality thresholds are fully configurable via parameters.

parameters.name: param_ionsdiff_low_k
parameters.label: Ion balance limit — low conductivity (µS/cm <= 20)
parameters.description: Maximum allowed IonsDiff% for samples with WeightedConductivity <= 20 µS/cm. Samples exceeding this threshold receive QualityIonsBalance = NO.

parameters.name: param_ionsdiff_high_k
parameters.label: Ion balance limit — high conductivity (µS/cm > 20)
parameters.description: Maximum allowed IonsDiff% for samples with WeightedConductivity > 20 µS/cm. Samples exceeding this threshold receive QualityIonsBalance = NO.

parameters.name: param_conddiff_low_1
parameters.label: Conductivity difference limit — very low conductivity (µS/cm <= 10)
parameters.description: Maximum allowed CondDiff% for samples with WeightedConductivity <= 10 µS/cm.

parameters.name: param_conddiff_low_2
parameters.label: Conductivity difference limit — low conductivity (µS/cm 10–20)
parameters.description: Maximum allowed CondDiff% for samples with WeightedConductivity between 10 and 20 µS/cm.

parameters.name: param_conddiff_high
parameters.label: Conductivity difference limit — high conductivity (µS/cm > 20)
parameters.description: Maximum allowed CondDiff% for samples with WeightedConductivity > 20 µS/cm.

parameters.name: param_ratio_nacl_low
parameters.label: Na/Cl ratio lower bound
parameters.description: Minimum acceptable Na/Cl molar ratio (µeq/l basis). Values below this threshold suggest sea-salt influence or analytical error.

parameters.name: param_ratio_nacl_high
parameters.label: Na/Cl ratio upper bound
parameters.description: Maximum acceptable Na/Cl molar ratio (µeq/l basis). Values above this threshold suggest Na contamination or analytical error.

inputs.name: input-data
inputs.label: Unit-transformed data ZIP
inputs.description: ZIP archive containing tab-separated CSV files with water chemistry data after unit transformation (mg/l, µg/l, µeq/l), one per SiteCode per subprogram. Produced by the UnitTransformation wrapper.

inputs.name: input-samples
inputs.label: Samples typology file
inputs.description: Excel file mapping each SampleID to its SamplingTypology (e.g. THR CON, BOF BL, SW CON). Required columns: SampleID, SamplingTypology. If not provided, typology-dependent checks (Org- estimation, BOF/WET ion balance filter, Na/Cl filter) are skipped.

outputs.name: output-alldata
outputs.label: Merged allData ZIP
outputs.description: ZIP archive containing one merged CSV per SiteCode with all subprograms joined (pre-validation).

outputs.name: output-validated
outputs.label: Validated data ZIP
outputs.description: ZIP archive containing one validated CSV per SiteCode, with all quality indicator columns and the FINAL_VALIDATION flag (SI/NO) appended.

author: LifeWatch ERIC
